tools.name: address_report
tools.description: One-call snapshot of a Base address: ETH balance, USDC balance, tx count, and whether it is a contract.

tools.name: token_info
tools.description: ERC-20 token metadata on Base: name, symbol, decimals, total supply.

tools.name: token_balance
tools.description: ERC-20 token balance of a holder on Base (formatted + raw).

tools.name: gas_now
tools.description: Current Base network gas price (gwei and wei).

tools.name: tx_status
tools.description: Look up a Base transaction by hash: status, from, to, value, block, gas used.
